zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Beatrice de Boyville於大約1308年出生在英國越可爾考拉姆時，她的父親John de Boyville20歲，母親Beatrice of Yorkshire18歲。她和Barnard Hutchinson Esquire至少有4個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1377年7月27日在英國越可爾享年70歲，埋葬在英國越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Beatrice de Boyville于大约1308年出生在英国越可爾考拉姆时，她的父亲John de Boyville20岁，母亲Beatrice of Yorkshire18岁。她和Barnard Hutchinson Esquire至少有4个儿子和6个女儿。她去世于1377年7月27日在英国越可爾享年70岁，埋葬在英国越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Boyville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of   Bonneville   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Bonneville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francois, Liette, Normand, Pierre.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Bonneville, from Old French bonne ‘good’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Bonville .
Altered form of French Bonnevialle: habitational name from Bonnevialle in the central part of France.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Beatrice de Boyville was born about 1308, in Cowlam, Yorkshire, England, her father, John de Boyville, was 20 and her mother, Beatrice of Yorkshire, was 18. She had at least 4 sons and 6 daughters with Barnard Hutchinson Esquire. She died on 27 July 1377, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.Cowlam, Yorkshire East Riding, England,: Cowlam, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Beatrice de Boyville est née environ 1308, à Cowlam, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Boyville, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Beatrice of Yorkshire, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles avec Barnard Hutchinson Esquire. Elle est décédée le 27 juillet 1377, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Cowlam, Yorkshire East Riding, England,: Cowlam, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Beatrice de Boyville um 1308 in Cowlam, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Boyville 20 und ihre Mutter Beatrice of Yorkshire 18. Sie hatte mit Barnard Hutchinson Esquire mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Juli 1377 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Beatrice de Boyville è nata il circa 1308 nel Cowlam, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John de Boyville, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Beatrice of Yorkshire, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie con Barnard Hutchinson Esquire. Morì il 27 luglio 1377, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Beatrice de Boyvilleが約1308年にイギリスヨークシュアイアコウラムで生まれた時，父John de Boyvilleは20歳，母Beatrice of Yorkshireは18歳であった。彼女はBarnard Hutchinson Esquireとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1377年7月27日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで70歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.Cowlam, Yorkshire East Riding, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 코우램
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Beatrice de Boyville(이)가 대략 1308년 영국 요르크실르 코우램에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Boyville(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice of Yorkshire(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Barnard Hutchinson Esquire(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1377년 7월 27일 영국 요르크실르에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.Cowlam, Yorkshire East Riding, England,: Cowlam, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Beatrice de Boyville nasceu aproximadamente 1308, em Cowlam, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Boyville, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice of Yorkshire, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas com Barnard Hutchinson Esquire. Ela faleceu em 27 de julho de 1377, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Cowlam, Yorkshire East Riding, England,: коулэм, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Beatrice de Boyville родилась около 1308 г. в местности коулэм, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Boyville было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice of Yorkshire, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей от Barnard Hutchinson Esquire. Она умерла 27 июля 1377 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas con Barnard Hutchinson Esquire. Murió el 27 de julio de 1377, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
